title: Zoro Cuts Through Fear
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows G-5 Marines, Nami, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Zoro, Unknown person #4. The central beat is zoro cuts through fear.
scene: The scene focuses on zoro cuts through fear, with G-5 Marines, Nami, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Zoro, Unknown person #4 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let's hurry up and save those kids

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just like Captain- Chan told us to!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So there was a Logia besides Caesar!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He'd cut down anyone without mercy, yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No need to worry about Tashighi- chan

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm free to do as I please.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And you're free to believe that.

summary: Zoro Cuts Through Fear. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
